productDisplayName: Homme Men Black Semi Formal Shoes
description: Excellence in materials and brilliance in craftsmanship are on display in this shoe from homme. Perfect for semi-formal or dressy casual occasions, this pair is set to step up to any sartorial challenge. Wear this with a tonal blazer, your favourite jeans and a crew neck tee. Don't forget to accessorise with a matching belt, watch and socks!UpperLeather upper with slip on styling and cut out detailing all overTwisted braid styling at the seams of the toe boxElasticated inserts at the sides of the tongue for easy insertion of feetReinforced overlay at the heelPerforated, padded and removable footbedUpper adhered to the outsole for maximum durabilityOutsoleTPU outsole with a stacked heel and textured patterns for gripShoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustUse a leather brush to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
